name: Userflow
description: Userflow in-app onboarding and product adoption platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Userflow
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API Keys
3. Create or copy an API key
4. Paste it below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Userflow product adoption platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Userflow users to verify product adoption access
